episodeList.title: FAWLTY TOWERS: 2-3 Waldorf Salad

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-1 Hell
episodeList.description: Ted, Dougal and Jack take their annual holiday and encounter Father Noel Furlong.

episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/2- 2 Think Fast, Father Ted.m4v
episodeList.description: When Ted holds a raffle, he destroys the prize - a new car.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-3 Tentacles of Doom
episodeList.description: Three bishops visit the island.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-4 Old Grey Whistle Theft
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/2- 4 Old Grey Whistle Theft.m4v
episodeList.description: Dougal starts hanging around with a rebellious priest, Father Damo Lennon.

episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/2- 5 A Song for Europe.m4v
episodeList.description: Ted is goaded by Father Dick Byrne into attempting to write a song for "Eurosong '96".

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-6 The Plague

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-7 Rock-a-Hula Ted
episodeList.description: A female singer (a parody of Sinéad O'Connor) visits the island just when Ted is judging the annual Lovely Girls competition.

episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/2- 8 Cigarettes and Alcohol and Rollerblading.m4v
episodeList.description: In a game of one-upmanship with Dick Byrne, Ted decides the three priests must give something up for Lent.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-9 New Jack City
episodeList.description: Jack's hairy hands get him sent to an old priests' home.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 2-10 Flight into Terror
episodeList.description: A flight back from a pilgrimage runs out of fuel and there are only two parachutes.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-1 Are you Right There, Father Ted
episodeList.shortName: 3-1 Are you Right There, Father Ted
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/3-1 Are you Right There, Father Ted.m4v
episodeList.description: Ted's "Chinaman" impression goes down badly with Craggy Island's Chinese community.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-2 Chirpy Burpy Cheap Sheep
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/3-2 Chirpy Burpy Cheap Sheep.m4v
episodeList.description: Ted makes a large bet on the King of the Sheep competition.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-3 Speed 3

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-4 The Mainland

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-5 Escape from Victory
episodeList.description: Ted takes great steps to ensure he wins a bet with Dick Byrne on the outcome of the All-Priests Over-75's Five-a-Side Football Championship.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-6 Kicking Bishop Brennan
episodeList.description: Exposed as a cheat at the end of the previous episode, a terrified Ted tries to draw upon his courage to complete the forfeit.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-7 Night of the Nearly Dead
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Father Ted/3-7 Night of the Nearly Dead.m4v
episodeList.description: Young TV presenter Eoin McLove pays a visit to Craggy Island, causing excitement for the island's aging females, who besiege the Parochial House.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: 3-8 Going to America
episodeList.description: Ted gets the opportunity of a lifetime, but can't bring himself to break it to the others that they're not invited.

episodeList.title: FATHER TED: A Christmassy Ted
episodeList.description: Ted's quick thinking whilst lost in a department store's lingerie department earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award.

episodeList.title: THE HITCHHIKER'S GUIDE TO THE GALAXY: (1 of 6)

episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy/(5 of 6).mp4

episodeList.title: THE HITCHHIKER'S GUIDE TO THE GALAXY: (6 of 6)

episodeList.description: The arrival of the "guest from hell", a rather deaf, domineering and bad-tempered woman interferes with Basil's attempts to prevent the money he won on a racehorse from being discovered by Sybil.
